title: App Settings - General - Licenses no wifi  [New]
scenario: Verify license links and source links function correctly when the app is opened without WiFi
steps: Turn off WiFi and start the app.
Tap the hamburger icon to open App Settings.
Tap each license link (MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.).
Tap the Source link for each license.
expected: Each license opens with headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button visible in the upper right corner. Tapping the Source link for each license currently shows a "Something is wrong" screen.
